EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](ET/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.etId: The ID of the dedicated line
EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.etChannelId: The ID of the dedicated line channel
EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.baiduIpv6Address: IPv6 interconnection address on the cloud network side
EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.customerIpv6Address: IPv6 interconnection address on the IDC side
EnableDedicatedChannelIpv6.ipv6Networks: IPv6 routing parameters, required when the channel routing type is static routing
